cases.input: Hi, I upgraded yesterday but I still see the free plan on my invoice. Can you check my billing?
cases.expected_summary: The customer upgraded but their invoice still shows the free plan.
cases.notes: Clear billing issue about invoice and plan charge.

cases.input: Every time I upload a CSV, the page freezes and then says something went wrong.
cases.expected_summary: The customer cannot upload a CSV because the page freezes and errors.

cases.input: I forgot my password and the reset link never came to my email.
cases.expected_summary: The customer cannot reset their password because the reset email never arrived.

cases.input: Do you offer discounts for students or small nonprofits?
cases.expected_summary: The customer is asking whether student or nonprofit discounts are available.
cases.notes: General sales/policy question, not a billing error.

cases.input: I cancelled last week, so obviously I loved seeing another charge today. Refund please.
cases.expected_summary: The customer cancelled but was charged again and wants a refund.
cases.notes: Sarcasm makes the intent slightly harder.

cases.input: login page bas load hi nahi ho raha, I need to get into my account urgently
cases.expected_summary: The login page is not loading and the customer urgently needs account access.
cases.notes: Mixed Hindi-English; main issue is technical page loading failure.

cases.input: Please change the admin email from rahul@example.com to ops@example.com.
cases.expected_summary: The customer wants the admin email changed to a new address.

cases.input: The API returns 401 for our production key, but the key is active in settings.
cases.expected_summary: The customer gets 401 API errors even though their production key appears active.

cases.input: Can someone explain the difference between the Growth and Business plans?
cases.expected_summary: The customer wants to understand the difference between two plans.

cases.input: My teammate cannot see the project even though I invited her twice.
cases.expected_summary: The customer's invited teammate cannot access the project.
cases.notes: Could look technical, but it is permissions/account access.

cases.input: charged??? why 49 when website said 29
cases.expected_summary: The customer is asking why they were charged 49 instead of the advertised 29.

cases.input: Your app is great. I just wanted to say thanks to the support team.
cases.expected_summary: The customer is thanking the support team and sharing positive feedback.

cases.input: I need the receipt for March for our finance team.
cases.expected_summary: The customer needs a March receipt for their finance team.

cases.input: The mobile app crashes after I tap the notification bell.
cases.expected_summary: The mobile app crashes when the customer taps the notification bell.

cases.input: Delete my workspace. I am moving to another tool.
cases.expected_summary: The customer wants their workspace deleted because they are moving to another tool.

cases.input: Is there a public roadmap for upcoming features?
cases.expected_summary: The customer is asking whether a public product roadmap exists.

cases.input: I paid for annual, but my account says trial expired. What is happening?
cases.expected_summary: The customer paid annually but their account still says the trial expired.
cases.notes: Billing and account overlap; expected billing because payment status is central.

cases.input: The report export button is visible, but clicking it does nothing in Chrome.
cases.expected_summary: The report export button does nothing when clicked in Chrome.

cases.input: Please add SSO access for our security group.
cases.expected_summary: The customer wants SSO access added for their security group.

cases.input: hello???
cases.expected_summary: The customer sent a very short greeting without a specific issue.
